hero_subtitle: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific Travel Rule policies, provider outputs, and regulatory changes into a structured compliance workflow with audit-ready evidence and case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Travel Rule messages remain operationally disconnected
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle when Travel Rule data, exception handling and messaging status are not integrated into broader workflows. This separation slows review processes, weakens audit evidence and complicates multi-jurisdiction compliance management for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates Travel Rule data, exception handling, and messaging status with compliance cases, decision logs, and audit evidence to streamline multi-jurisdictional workflows and strengthen operational control for VASP teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule events to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages through routing, exception handling, case creation and evidence preservation for FATF-aligned compliance and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented workflows. One FATF compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs a provider-neutral layer that connects Travel Rule messages, jurisdictional policies, cases and audit evidence into one consistent FATF-aligned operating workflow.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing FATF-aligned Travel Rule workflows with structured evidence, provider orchestration and enterprise deployment controls from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for FATF Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer connecting Travel Rule workflows, regulatory rules, provider outputs, case management and reporting for FATF-aligned digital asset businesses such as VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes and flags Travel Rule exceptions to structured review workflows, enabling teams to manage, investigate and resolve failed or incomplete message events efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and all supporting evidence to support audit readiness and enable defensible compliance reviews across Travel Rule operations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects outputs from multiple Travel Rule providers into a connected operational layer without disrupting existing vendor integrations or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule or compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule or compliance providers; it connects their outputs into structured workflows, audit evidence and reporting for better oversight.
final_title: Structure FATF Travel Rule workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects jurisdictional Travel Rule policies, message routing, exceptions and audit-ready compliance cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
